Description: Verify assessment objectives scope assets and authorization are formally approved
Confirm production isolation rollback procedures VM snapshots and recovery plans are available
Validate target hosts accounts and services are available and operational
Verify Sysmon Windows Event Logs Splunk Active Directory DNS and firewall logging are enabled
Confirm required SIEM detection rules are deployed active and validated before testing
Execute the approved attack scenario within the authorized laboratory environment
Confirm expected endpoint identity authentication and network telemetry was collected
Verify the simulated activity generated the expected SIEM alerts and detection events
Confirm simulated techniques are mapped to ATT&CK tactics and supported by detection coverage
Validate evidence lineage across simulation telemetry detections and assessment findings
Confirm all Phase F assessment templates are completed and reviewed
Document detection gaps telemetry improvements and remediation recommendations
Verify assessor and reviewer have approved the completed Purple Team validation
